title: Python tests: DodagState tests use IPv6Address but topology_from_states returns strings
description: In python/tests/rpl/test_visualize.py, the test test_topology_and_ranks_from_states() was updated to use IPv6Address for the root_addr. The assertion 'assert topo["child"] == str(root_addr)' correctly converts to string. However, this highlights that topology_from_states() returns strings while DodagState.preferred_parent is now IPv6Address. The type mismatch is handled but may be confusing - consider whether Topology should use IPv6Address consistently.
close_reason: Test correctly uses str() conversion to match Topology type annotation - no issue
